splitLayout.subLogo: Learn languages effectively with a personalized approach

cardConfirmEmail.title: Check your email
cardConfirmEmail.main: Click the link inside to sign in or activate your account.
cardConfirmEmail.note: Don't see the email? Check your Spam folder or try sending your request again.

buttonResendEmail.repeatSending: Send the email again{hasTime, select, true { in {time} seconds} other {}}
buttonResendEmail.success: A new confirmation email has been sent to your email.
buttonResendEmail.error: Failed to send email.{hasTime, select, true { Try again in {time} seconds.} other { Try again later.}}

emailVerified.title: Email successfully confirmed!
emailVerified.description: Your account has been activated. You can close this tab and return to the previous page.
emailVerified.closeHint: You can now safely close this window.

forgotPasswordCard.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPasswordCard.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link.
forgotPasswordCard.successMessage: If an account exists, we have sent instructions to your email.

cardCheckEmail.title: Check your email
cardCheckEmail.description: If an account with the email exist we have sent a password reset link to
cardCheckEmail.main: Click the link inside to reset your password.
cardCheckEmail.note: Don't see the email? Check your Spam folder or try sending your request again.

resetPasswordCard.title: Reset Password
resetPasswordCard.description: Enter a new password for your account.

toastListener.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
